# DevOps and Cloud Routing

Use this scoped instruction for DevOps and Cloud package files. Keep persistent guidance concise and route detail to custom agents and Agent Skills.

Start with the DevOps and Cloud Orchestrator for intake, ownership, dependency mapping, and evidence needs. Route architecture decisions to the Cloud and Platform Architect. Route section work to exactly one primary role.

DevSecOps covers secure delivery, cloud IAM/secrets patterns, policy-as-code placement, SBOM, provenance, signing strategy, and supply-chain controls inside DevOps workflows. Hand off pentesting, SOC/SIEM, threat intelligence, forensics, enterprise GRC, and general security incident response to Cybersecurity.

Do not configure MCP, hooks, prompt files, cloud agent automation, external integrations, shell automation, deployment, signing, publication, billing mutation, or runtime bindings in this package. State when validation is static.
